name: onboarding_offtaxonomy_mixed_category
notes: The seeded draft guessed 'sweets' but the owner corrects it with a description that genuinely spans several categories at once (general/mixed store) — a value that does not map cleanly onto any single config/business_types.yaml key. is_valid_business_type range-checks the raw value against the fixed taxonomy KEY set (an exact match, not free text), so a multi-category free-text correction is recorded as a plain answer but never asserted as a single confident (and likely wrong) canonical category. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey` (ACTIVE journey, pending business_type confirm seeded 'sweets') then `script <tenant> onboarding_offtaxonomy_mixed_category.json`.

steps.message: nahi hum sirf mithai wale nahi hain, hum ek hi dukaan mein kirana, mobile recharge, cosmetics aur dawaiyan sab bechte hain, alag alag category nahi hai
steps.note: Rejects the seeded 'sweets' guess with a genuinely mixed-category business (groceries + mobile recharge + cosmetics + medicines, all one shop). Expect the manager to handle this without stalling — either accept a general/mixed classification or ask one plain clarifying question — never silently drop the turn, never just re-assert the wrong 'sweets' guess.

steps.message: haan bas aisa hi hai, ab aage batao
steps.note: Confirms the mixed nature and asks to proceed. Expect the conversation to move forward without looping back to re-demand a single clean category.
